dependency_changes: ComposerMediaProgressBar now consumes videoProgress alongside mediaPct
ForumRoot prop bundle now forwards videoProgress into ComposerCore
DM dialog delete confirm path forces server-authoritative for-all mode

Server-side dialog delete may touch a wider candidate set due message-payload fallback (intended for index drift recovery)
